arts.ttl: Sky Sport Italia: Paulo Fonseca to be sacked by AC Milan
arts.sum: AC Milan's recent 1-1 draw against AS Roma has intensified speculation that head coach Paulo Fonseca is set to be fired by the club. The match, which was crucial for both teams, ended with neither side able to secure a much-needed victory, leaving Milan dissatisfied with the outcome. arts.ttl: Serie A | Milan 1-1 Roma: Match Report
arts.sum: In a match that both teams desperately needed to win, Milan and Roma settled for a 1-1 draw at San Siro, leaving neither side satisfied with the outcome. Tijjani Reijnders opened the scoring for Milan, but Paulo Dybala equalized with a stunning volley, ensuring the points were shared.
